backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Curation, Swarm, Location, LawToken, InterpretationToken, voting, collectibles) and persistent state maps for the application backend, with imports for access control and user approval modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities, recent changes, and architectural notes for build planning.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React frontend, mounting the app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing authentication state, view routing across six views, profile setup modal display, and a silent one-time-per-login effect that computes and persists hidden collectible IDs based on archived node data.
frontend/src/components/CreateNodeDialog: Dialog component for creating all node types (Curation, Swarm, Location, InterpretationToken) with ISO country code selection, custom attributes, directionality options, and an `extractLawTokenSequence` helper to supply the required `originalTokenSequence` field.
Admin-only alert dialog that requires typing 'RESET' to confirm permanent deletion of all application data except user profiles and access control settings.
A modal dialog that displays a filterable and sortable flat list of graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) with badges showing node type, jurisdiction, shared law token status, and linked location counts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a heart icon and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The app header with logo, theme toggle, navigation tabs (Graph, List, Terminal, Swarms, Buzz, Collectibles), login/logout via Internet Identity, and a create-node dialog — tabs are only shown when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LandingGraphDiag: An animated canvas-based force-directed graph for the landing page that fetches graph data from the backend (with 24-hour localStorage caching) and renders nodes with hover tooltips using a grey/gold color scheme.
frontend/src/components/MermaidDiagram.t: A component that dynamically loads Mermaid.js from CDN and renders a Mermaid diagram from a provided text string, handling loading states, stale render cancellation, and error display.
frontend/src/components/NFTDetailModal.t: A modal for viewing and minting collectible editions of law tokens or interpretation tokens, showing edition ownership status, BUZZ balance, mint price, and handling the mint transaction with error/success feedback.
frontend/src/components/NFTGallery.tsx: Displays a grid of the user's Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles, filtering out archived ones, with a minted badge indicator and a detail modal on click.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSettingsM: Modal dialog for editing the user's profile name, social URL, and NFT mint settings (number of copies), while also displaying their current BUZZ token balance.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: One-time onboarding modal that prompts a new user to enter a username and creates their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/SchemaBuilderFil: Modal for browsing and filtering InterpretationTokens by tags, source/target nodes, and sort order, rendering each token as a clickable card that opens a detail modal.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipA: Displays pending and approved swarm membership requests for a given swarm, allowing the owner to approve contributors with principal validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipB: Renders a context-aware button or badge for swarm membership: shows 'Creator' badge for the swarm owner, 'Member' badge if already joined, or a 'Join' button that sends a join request.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipM: Displays a card listing all swarms the current user has created or joined, with each swarm expandable via an accordion to show its contributors via SwarmMembershipApproval.
frontend/src/components/TerminalDisambig: Renders a keyboard-navigable list of disambiguated node candidates in a terminal-style UI, allowing the user to select and confirm a match or cancel.
frontend/src/components/TerminalOntology: Displays ontology output in both Turtle (TTL) and Mermaid diagram formats with copy buttons, handling server-side and client-side Mermaid rendering errors.
frontend/src/components/VoronoiDiagram.t: Renders a canvas-based Voronoi diagram of graph nodes fetched from the backend (with 24-hour localStorage caching), supporting hover tooltips and node-type color styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient and exposing status flags through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (graph data, swarms, curations, tokens, etc.), including a helper that reconstructs a full GraphData object from flat OwnedGraphData arrays.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds custom scrollbar and Voronoi diagram styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BuzzLeaderboard.tsx: Page component that fetches and displays a ranked leaderboard of BUZZ scores, scaling stored integer values by 10^7 for display.
frontend/src/pages/CollectiblesView.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the NFTGallery component for browsing Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles.
frontend/src/pages/DebugPanel.tsx: Admin debug page that displays graph data (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) in tabbed tables and exposes a data reset dialog for admin users.
frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx: Interactive canvas-based graph visualization page that renders nodes and edges with zoom/pan, spatial indexing for culling, persistent layout caching, and node-type filters.
frontend/src/pages/OntologiesView.tsx: Page that displays the core Hyvmind OWL/Turtle ontology and per-swarm ontologies in collapsible sections with download support.
frontend/src/pages/TerminalPage.tsx: A terminal-style UI page that accepts slash commands to create and query graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, interpretation tokens), with session persistence, disambiguation picking, and ontology output rendering.
frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx: A hierarchical tree view page that displays graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens) with expand/collapse, badges, swarm membership controls, and node creation dialogs.
frontend/src/utils/archivedCollectiblesS: Provides localStorage-backed utilities to get, set, and clear hidden collectible IDs keyed by user principal.
frontend/src/utils/coreOntology.ts: Defines shared Turtle/OWL ontology prefix declarations, class definitions, and property definitions for the Hyvmind knowledge graph schema.
frontend/src/utils/ontologySanitize.ts: Exports helper functions to sanitize strings into valid Turtle local names or Mermaid node IDs, and to truncate labels for compact diagram display.
frontend/src/utils/terminalCommands.ts: Implements terminal command execution logic for creating graph nodes, with validation (jurisdiction codes, tag types), and localStorage-based node archiving utilities.
frontend/src/utils/terminalMessages.ts: Provides formatting functions that return human-readable terminal output strings for help text, errors, find results, filter results, and archive command feedback.
frontend/src/utils/terminalNameResolutio: Resolves node name references (by name or ID) for terminal commands, returning resolved, ambiguous, not-found, or graph-not-loaded status. Determines valid node types per command/field and searches curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, and interpretation tokens case-insensitively.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyMerma: Generates a compact Mermaid flowchart diagram showing a node's ontology context, including parent/child (hasChild) and interpretation (FromRelation/ToRelation) relationships with limited child/interpretation counts for compactness.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyTurtl: Generates RDF Turtle serialization for a given graph node, organized into Properties, Classes, and Relations sections using core ontology prefixes and sanitized local names.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOutputFormatt: Parses terminal message text into structured line tokens with type classifications (heading, command, description, list, etc.) and indentation levels, and provides a helper to get emoji markers for message types.
frontend/src/utils/terminalParser.ts: Parses terminal command strings starting with '/' into a structured object containing the command name and key=value fields, with special handling for quoted values, repeated keys, and the tokens={...} brace syntax.
frontend/src/utils/terminalSession.ts: Persists and restores terminal message history to/from localStorage with versioned session validation, and provides a function to clear the stored session.
frontend/src/utils/ttlToMermaid.ts: Parses TTL (Turtle RDF) text to extract node labels and relationships, then converts them into a Mermaid flowchart diagram string. Also exports a backward-compatible wrapper that returns the diagram text or an error message.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/src/utils/voronoiPalette.ts: Defines a fixed color palette (fill, stroke, seed) for five Hyvmind node types (curation, swarm, location, lawToken, interpretationToken) and exports a lookup function with a grey fallback for unknown types.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based design tokens (colors, border radius, shadows, animations), and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and pending work items; the single pending task (AR-1) is to remove the authentication guard from the backend getGraphData() query function so it is publicly accessible.
